description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Snyk that runs on every push and pull request with read permission to repository contents. In a single ubuntu-latest job, check out the code, set up Python 3.10 and Node.js 18, cache pip packages, upgrade pip, and install requirements from misc/analysis-requirements.txt or misc/coverage-requirements.txt based on the matrix strategy. Then, install Snyk globally with npm and run Snyk test with the provided requirements file and SNYK_TOKEN from secrets.
